findings.message: Target PR #8 stays inside the owner-approved Instagram public handle scope.
evidence: TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn remain not_provided and pending_owner_input.

findings.message: Mandatory live social action blocks remain present after the handle update.
Safe target checks passed before target merge.

optionalImprovements: Add TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn public handles only after the owner provides exact public metadata.
Keep social OAuth, posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, and n8n activation as separate approval-gated milestones.
limitations: Critique is advisory only and cannot approve, merge, deploy, connect accounts, schedule, post, use credentials, call analytics APIs, activate automations, or create accepted lessons.
No browser automation was run; review relied on static source inspection and safe local checks.
Review did not alter target repository settings, sensitive values, live social accounts, production deployment, or domain/DNS.
